title: Coregentis Temporal Record
description: Cross-cutting temporal semantics record for Coregentis runtime objects.

temporal_class.description: Temporal behavior class drawn from the Coregentis object registry baseline.

cognition_time.description: When the runtime incorporated or reasoned over the object.

event_time.description: When the source event occurred outside or before runtime incorporation.

valid_from.description: Start of the object's validity window, if applicable.

valid_until.description: End of the object's validity window, if applicable.

replay_until.description: End of replay eligibility horizon, if applicable.

rollback_until.description: End of rollback eligibility horizon, if applicable.

drift_horizon_until.description: End of active drift horizon, if applicable.

retention_until.description: End of retention horizon, if applicable.

notes.description: Optional temporal notes for later object-specific interpretation.
